# SquarePic — Free Online Image Editor
# https://squarepic.io

SquarePic is a free, privacy-first online image editor. All processing happens entirely in your browser via HTML5 Canvas — images are never uploaded to any server. No signup, no watermarks, no tracking. Open source on GitHub.

## About
SquarePic lets you resize, crop, compress, and convert images locally in your browser. Created by SevenOneLabs. Supports PNG, JPEG, WebP, GIF, BMP, TIFF, AVIF, and ICO formats.

## Core Tools
- Square Image Editor (make any photo square with blur/solid/crop): https://squarepic.io/edit
- Image Compressor (reduce file size with quality slider or target-size mode): https://squarepic.io/compressor
- Image Converter (convert between 8 formats, batch mode): https://squarepic.io/converter
- Photo Cropper (interactive crop with aspect ratio presets): https://squarepic.io/cropper
- HD Image Upscaler (upscale images 2x, 3x, or 4x with bicubic interpolation and smart sharpening): https://squarepic.io/upscaler
- Image Size Calculator (find social media dimensions by search or platform): https://squarepic.io/image-size-calculator

## Platform Size Guides (13 platforms)
- Instagram image sizes: https://squarepic.io/resize/instagram
- Facebook image sizes: https://squarepic.io/resize/facebook
- X (Twitter) image sizes: https://squarepic.io/resize/x-twitter
- LinkedIn image sizes: https://squarepic.io/resize/linkedin
- TikTok image sizes: https://squarepic.io/resize/tiktok
- YouTube image sizes: https://squarepic.io/resize/youtube
- Pinterest image sizes: https://squarepic.io/resize/pinterest
- Snapchat image sizes: https://squarepic.io/resize/snapchat
- WhatsApp image sizes: https://squarepic.io/resize/whatsapp
- Twitch image sizes: https://squarepic.io/resize/twitch
- Reddit image sizes: https://squarepic.io/resize/reddit
- Telegram image sizes: https://squarepic.io/resize/telegram
- Discord image sizes: https://squarepic.io/resize/discord

## Format Converters (12+ conversion pairs)
- PNG to JPG: https://squarepic.io/converter/png-to-jpg
- JPG to PNG: https://squarepic.io/converter/jpg-to-png
- PNG to WebP: https://squarepic.io/converter/png-to-webp
- JPG to WebP: https://squarepic.io/converter/jpg-to-webp
- WebP to PNG: https://squarepic.io/converter/webp-to-png
- WebP to JPG: https://squarepic.io/converter/webp-to-jpg
- PNG to GIF: https://squarepic.io/converter/png-to-gif
- JPG to GIF: https://squarepic.io/converter/jpg-to-gif
- PNG to ICO: https://squarepic.io/converter/png-to-ico
- JPG to ICO: https://squarepic.io/converter/jpg-to-ico
- PNG to AVIF: https://squarepic.io/converter/png-to-avif
- JPG to AVIF: https://squarepic.io/converter/jpg-to-avif
- WebP to AVIF: https://squarepic.io/converter/webp-to-avif
- WebP to GIF: https://squarepic.io/converter/webp-to-gif

## Content & Guides
### Blog Posts
- How to Square an Image for Any Social Media Platform: https://squarepic.io/blog/how-to-square-image-for-any-platform
  Three methods (Dynamic Blur, Solid Color Fill, Smart Crop) for creating square images without cropping. Includes dimension cheat sheet, common mistakes, and best practices.
- Privacy-First Image Editing: Why Your Photos Should Stay on Your Device: https://squarepic.io/blog/privacy-first-image-editing
  Explains client-side vs server-side image processing, privacy risks of upload-based tools, and how HTML5 Canvas enables private editing. References GDPR and CCPA.

### Guides
- Social Media Image Sizes 2026: Complete Cheat Sheet: https://squarepic.io/guides/social-media-image-sizes-2026
  Complete dimensions reference for all 13 platforms with aspect ratios and image types.

### Research
- Image Compression Benchmarks 2026: JPEG vs PNG vs WebP vs AVIF: https://squarepic.io/research/image-compression-benchmarks
  Original benchmark data across 8 quality levels. Key finding: WebP at quality 80% offers the best balance of size and quality.

### Comparisons
- SquarePic vs Canva: https://squarepic.io/compare/squarepic-vs-canva
- SquarePic vs iLoveIMG: https://squarepic.io/compare/squarepic-vs-iloveimg
- SquarePic vs TinyPNG: https://squarepic.io/compare/squarepic-vs-tinypng

### Information Pages
- About SquarePic: https://squarepic.io/about
- FAQ: https://squarepic.io/faq
- Support: https://squarepic.io/support
- Privacy Policy: https://squarepic.io/privacy
- Terms of Service: https://squarepic.io/terms

## Key Features
- All processing is client-side via HTML5 Canvas — images never leave your device
- No signup, no accounts, no personal data collected
- No watermarks or branding added to exported images
- Open source on GitHub (https://github.com/Sevenonelabs/square_pic)
- Export formats: PNG, JPEG, WebP, BMP, GIF, ICO, AVIF, TIFF
- Import formats: PNG, JPEG, WebP, GIF, BMP, TIFF, AVIF, ICO (up to 20 MB)
- Batch compress with quality slider or target-size mode
- Batch convert between 8 image formats
- Interactive crop with 8 drag handles, aspect ratio lock, zoom and pan
- 13 social media platform presets with correct dimensions
- Works on desktop, tablet, and mobile browsers
- 100% free — no trials, no credit cards, no limits

## Compression Research Data (2026)
- WebP at quality 80%: 36 KB for a 1920x1080 photo (vs 52 KB JPEG, 412 KB PNG)
- AVIF at quality 80%: 23 KB — 55-83% smaller than JPEG
- AVIF at quality 70-80% recommended for maximum performance
- WebP at quality 75-85% recommended for balance of quality and compatibility
- PNG remains essential for transparency and lossless quality (logos, screenshots)
- Data sourced from SquarePic internal testing with browser-grade encoders

## Social Media Square Dimensions (quick reference)
- Instagram: 1080x1080 (feed), 320x320 (profile)
- Facebook: 1200x1200 (post), 180x180 (profile)
- LinkedIn: 1200x1200 (post), 400x400 (profile)
- X/Twitter: 1200x1200 (post), 400x400 (profile)
- TikTok: 1080x1080 (post), 200x200 (profile)
- YouTube: 1280x1280 (thumbnail safe zone), 800x800 (profile)
